_comment: Multi-lab mutation audit baseline. Captures the count of known violations as of the discovery PR (2026-06-07). scripts/audit_multilab_mutations.py fails CI if the current count exceeds the per-page baseline below, so new code can't introduce new violations. Drive these to zero over a series of fix PRs; each fix lowers the per-page count.
_canonical_fix: PR #606 (VeritaTrack Add Task) — pass trackApi/tasksKey/dashKey props from the page-level scope into mutation components; POST to ${trackApi}/<endpoint>; invalidateQueries({queryKey: [tasksKey/dashKey]}).

_notes.AccountSettingsPage.tsx: POSSIBLE FALSE POSITIVE: /api/account/settings and /api/onboarding/status are user-scoped, not lab-scoped. Confirm and move to the allowlist in audit_multilab_mutations.py if so; otherwise scope.
_notes.VeritaCheckPage.tsx: POSSIBLE FALSE POSITIVE: /api/studies legacy endpoint, likely user-scoped. Verify against the GET query keyspace.
_notes.VeritaCheckVerificationPage.tsx: PROBABLE REAL BUG: /api/veritacheck/verifications mutations on a lab-aware page. Investigate in the fix PR.
_notes.VeritaCompAppPage.tsx: PROBABLE REAL BUG, LARGEST SURFACE: 18 invalidations across /api/competency/* and /api/veritacomp/* paths on a lab-aware page. Likely matches the VeritaTrack bug class exactly. Highest-priority fix.
